name: rfc-loop
description: Subagent-driven RFC implementation loop. Turns a merged RFC into one Epic + N sub-issues, then runs branch → held-implementer subagent (TDD) → spec-reviewer subagent → PR → Gemini + Codex cross-model review → merge loop one chunk at a time. Main agent stays clean as a project manager; per-PR implementer subagents do the coding via Agent + SendMessage.
